description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with a muscular build, wearing a sleeveless high-collar athletic top and fitted pants. The figure's arms are exposed, showing defined musculature, and both wrists are adorned with fingerless gloves and wristbands. The character sports a high, spiked hairstyle and a face mask covering the lower half of the face, giving a modern, urban, and slightly futuristic appearance. The pants are detailed with pockets and knee patches, and the footwear consists of chunky, athletic sneakers with visible straps. The overall look is completed with subtle accent details on the clothing, suggesting a fashion-forward, streetwear-inspired style.
description: A muscular adult male in urban athletic wear, featuring a sleeveless top, fitted pants, gloves, and a face mask, with a spiked hairstyle and chunky sneakers.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sleeveless top, face mask, gloves, and full details of the chest and footwear.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the arm musculature, glove details, and the profile of the spiked hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the high-collar back of the top, fitted pants, and the back of the sneakers and gloves.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the arm, glove, and side profile of the hairstyle and clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless athletic top, fitted pants, fingerless gloves, high-collar, wristbands, and face mask
